name: Mashine Gun
description: Bandit Mashine Guns are basic assault rifles built around huge magazines rather than finesse. They reload slowly and suffer from poor accuracy, which often leaves them outclassed, but they can keep firing for a long time before needing a reload. A Vladof barrel pushes the fire rate and magazine size even further, while a Bandit barrel leans more toward damage and slightly better accuracy.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
